{{CargoOrgan
|name=Argent Reverse Scale
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10944
|idx=93
|description="Dragons shall never be tamed! Even ensnared by demon gods, even as argent flames consume their flesh - their heads shall never bow!"
— Draconic Chronicles
|skill=
|hp=1796
|def=175
|atk=291
|rush=199
|gene1=Fire DMG +90
|gene2=Fire RES +90
|gene3=Fire DMG +1.5%
|gene4=Fire RES +1.5%
|gene5=1.5% chance to get Extra Inferno Ember on Wish ×10
|gene7=1.5% chance to get Extra Inferno Ember on Wish ×10 (Awakened)
|}}
